chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1871 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 07.12.2016. Mr. Nouman Sahito, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for respondents No.4 to 7. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G = Today, the alleged detenue-Shrimati Soomri is present alongwith respondent No.5-Rajoo, who is her husband. In this regard, a progress report has also been furnished by respondent No.3-SHO P.S Tando Baago, in which it has been mentioned that though the raids were conducted at the residences of private respondents but detenue was not there and she was residing with respondent No.5-Raju (her husband). Today in Court the said purported detenue-Shrimati Soomri is present and confirms that she married to respondent No.5-Raju, with whom she is living happily. The said Shrimati Soomri further states that she will remain in contact with her mother/petitioner (Shrimati Tejoo). In view of the above factual position, the purpose of this constitutional petition has been served and the same is disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
